title: Module 2 — Making Decisions
goal: Let your program choose what to do.

challenge.prompt: Print whether 10 is greater than 3 (it should print True or False).

lessons.title: if and else
lessons.concept: Run code only when a condition is true; else for the alternative.

challenge.prompt: Set age = 20. If age is 18 or more print adult, otherwise print minor.

lessons.title: elif: Many Paths
lessons.concept: Choosing among several options with elif.

challenge.prompt: Set score = 85. Print A if score >= 90, B if score >= 80, otherwise C.

lessons.title: Combining Conditions: and, or, not
lessons.concept: Build bigger conditions with and / or / not.

challenge.prompt: Set temp = 25 and sunny = True. Print beach if temp > 20 and sunny, else print home.
